description: Configure the store identity and design settings for 'Terra & Clay Studio'. Set the store name to 'Terra & Clay Studio', phone to '(505) 555-0142', and hours to 'Mon-Fri 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM'. The store address is 214 Canyon Road, Santa Fe, NM 87501, United States. Configure the store email addresses as follows: General Contact ('Terra & Clay Studio' <hello@terraandclay.com>), Sales Representative ('Terra & Clay Orders' <orders@terraandclay.com>), and Customer Support ('Terra & Clay Support' <support@terraandclay.com>). Update the design configuration with the HTML Head Default Title 'Terra & Clay Studio | Handcrafted Pottery & Ceramics', Meta Description 'Discover handcrafted pottery and ceramics by Elena Vasquez. Unique, artisan-made pieces for your home from Santa Fe, New Mexico.', Header Welcome Text 'Welcome to Terra & Clay Studio — Handcrafted with love in Santa Fe', and Footer Copyright 'Copyright © 2025 Terra & Clay Studio. All rights reserved.' Save all configurations.
